mapper.delete: DELETE FROM `dodamdodam`.`journals` WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT `id` AS `id`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `title` AS `title`, `book_title` AS `bookTitle`, `author` AS `author`, `content` AS `content`, DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `date`, `star` AS `star`, `status` AS `status`, `pages` AS `pages`, DATE_FORMAT(`created_at`, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS `createdAt` FROM `dodamdodam`.`journals` WHERE `user_id` = #{userId} ORDER BY `date` DESC, `created_at` DESC

SELECT `id` AS `id`, `user_id` AS `userId`, `title` AS `title`, `book_title` AS `bookTitle`, `author` AS `author`, `content`, DATE_FORMAT(`date`, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `date`, `star` AS `star`, `status` AS `status`, `pages` AS `pages`, DATE_FORMAT(`created_at`, '%Y-%m-%dT%H:%i:%s') AS `createdAt` FROM `dodamdodam`.`journals` WHERE `id` = #{id} AND `user_id` = #{userId}
